final_prompt.prompt:
Create an Instagram-style smartphone photo of Korean cafe fashion coffee and desserts with hand-drawn annotation overlays.

Style/medium: needs a "Korean cafe" aesthetic with "Instagram story" and "magazine rough notes" finish — references in the spirit of 2010s Seoul cafe Instagram culture, Kinfolk magazine editorial photography, Japanese zakka notebook illustration tradition; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be smartphone camera perspective, suitable for Instagram post, no human subjects visible
Subject: must include fashionable coffee beverage and dessert items as focal subjects
Scene/backdrop: must be Korean cafe interior setting
Lighting/mood: needs natural daylight cafe atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs warm, muted tones — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include Japanese handwritten annotations (hiragana 70%, simple kanji 30%) with diary-style short comments:
  - 飲み物 → 味・温度・気持ち (例：さっぱり、優しい甘み)
  - 食べ物 → 食感・おいしさ (例：しっとり、最高)
  - 空間 → 雰囲気 (例：リラックス、素敵な時間)
  - 全体 → 一言まとめ (例：幸せすぎる～)
Constraints: must include hand-drawn annotation elements — thin white pen-like sketch lines, rough uneven single-stroke style, contour lines tracing object perimeters, arrows and dotted lines for visual guidance, steam/sparkles/hearts/small emoticons as decoration with intentional留白 (blank space), annotations must follow the 7:3 hiragana-to-kanji ratio, comments must be short diary-style self-talk with emotional tone
Avoid: must avoid excessive decoration, must avoid crowded composition without blank space, must avoid human subjects
